title: Coulson will use CAREER award to reinvent how machines learn to control
summary_en: Next-generation technologies—including self-driving vehicles, intelligent robots, personalized healthcare devices, and smart infrastructure—are already reshaping industries and becoming increasingly woven into daily life.
